required_preferences.fact: Now schedules internal meetings in the mornings as needed—client email and team check-ins are fit around new account calls and onboarding duties

supersedes.fact: Blocks out mornings for team check-ins and client emails—never schedules internal meetings before noon

required_preferences.fact: Adheres to a regulated bedtime every night without exception—no longer flexes sleep schedule for presentations or prep; CPAP use strictly scheduled regardless of critical work events

supersedes.fact: Prioritizes sleep before big presentations—never stays up the night before, even if it means less prep

required_preferences.fact: Completes daily upper-body stretching and doctor-approved chair-based workouts to stay active during injury recovery—avoids any exercise that involves standing or impact
Eats lunch at the office cafeteria on on-site days—now avoids packing homemade lunches or eating out except with clients
Avoids late-night screen use and email; powers down devices at least 30 minutes before bedtime to support CPAP adherence and regulated sleep
Regularly coordinates shared family dinners or outings to integrate his brother into local routines during his stay

persona: A mid-level sales manager at a multinational pharmaceutical company
